title: architect-reviewer agent output
description: Machine-readable summary returned by the architect-reviewer agent after an inter-wave design audit. Mirrors the Output Format section of agents/architect-reviewer.md.

verdict.description: Overall disposition: PROCEED = no structural blockers; PROCEED_WITH_FOLLOWUPS = LOW/MEDIUM findings only; FIX_REQUIRED = HIGH finding that would compound across waves; BLOCKED = cannot complete review.

report_path.description: Relative path to the human-readable audit file written to .orchestrator/audits/.

files_reviewed.description: Number of source files examined during the audit.

adrs_checked.description: Number of ADR files read during Phase 1 context research.

language_md_checked.description: Whether a LANGUAGE.md file was found and checked for vocabulary drift.

blockers.description: Free-text blocker descriptions; empty array when verdict is not BLOCKED.
